name: @waelio/extension
description: Chrome Extension — browser companion for @waelio packages
author: Wael Wahbeh <waelio@waelio.com> (https://waelio.com)

scripts.package: rm -f waelio-extension.zip && zip -r waelio-extension.zip manifest.json dist/ popup/ sidepanel/ options/ icons/ styles/ -x '*.ts' -x '*.map'
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build && pnpm run package
